utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Checking the final property solution: 
1) property – fully detailed with type, location, price, currency, size, bedrooms, and features → fully specified.
2) financing – includes status, purchase_method, down_payment_percentage, down_payment_amount, processing_fees, and currency → fully specified.
3) legal_services – has service_name, cost, and currency → fully specified.
4) moving_services – includes service_level, cost, currency, and details → fully specified.
5) setup_services – includes utility_package, cost, currency, and services_included → fully specified.
6) total_budget – includes summary, breakdown, total_upfront_cost, and currency → fully specified.
All six items are present and contain all expected details.
